tools.name: OCR
tools.description: This tool can recognize all text on the input image.

outputs.description: OCR results, include bbox in x1, y1, x2, y2 format and the recognized text.

tools.name: ImageDescription
tools.description: A useful tool that returns a brief description of the input image.

tools.name: RegionAttributeDescription
tools.description: Describe the attribute of a region of the input image.

inputs.name: bbox
inputs.description: The bbox coordinate in the format of `(x1, y1, x2, y2)`

dialogs.content: What was the purpose of the chest x-ray?

dialogs.thought: Check for any embedded labels/captions that state the indication or postoperative purpose.
Identify modality and any obvious postoperative context from the overall radiograph appearance.

content.content: Frontal chest radiograph showing both lungs and mediastinum; no visible overlaid text. Cardiomediastinal silhouette central; mild basilar haziness/atelectasis suggested. No obvious large pleural effusion or pneumothorax.

arguments.attribute: anterior cardiophrenic angle/retrocardiac region appearance for any herniated bowel or mass effect

dialogs.thought: Assess the typical location for a Morgagni hernia (right anterior cardiophrenic angle) for absence of postoperative recurrence.

content.content: Region shows expected cardiomediastinal contour and adjacent lung; no clear air-filled bowel loops, no rounded anterior diaphragmatic mass, and no obvious herniation pattern in this view.

dialogs.content: The purpose of the chest x-ray was to evaluate the outcome of the operation and to confirm that there is no evidence of Morgagni's hernia after the surgery.

whitelist: The purpose of the chest x-ray was to evaluate the outcome of the operation and to confirm that there is no evidence of Morgagni's hernia after the surgery.
